title: refund.py
payment.py
content:
class Payment:
    def __init__(self, method, amount, account_id=None, vpa=None, card_last4=None):
        self.method = method
        self.amount = amount
        self.account_id = account_id
        self.vpa = vpa
        self.card_last4 = card_last4

title: test_refund.py
content:
def test_upi_refund_uses_vpa():
    p = Payment('upi', 100, vpa='alice@bank')
    result = process_refund(p)
    assert result['destination'] == 'alice@bank'  # FAILS: got None

title: stack_trace.log
content:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "refund.py", line 4, in process_refund
    return issue_refund(payment.card_last4, payment.amount)
AssertionError: UPI refund destination was None, expected 'alice@bank'

title: README.md
content: Payments service. Handles card and UPI payments and refunds. Run tests with pytest.

title: architecture.md
content: The payments service is split into gateway, ledger, and refund modules. Refunds flow through the refund module which calls the gateway.
